name: compliance-rules
description: Company-wide compliance and claim-safety rules for generated Web2App funnels.

rules.description: Avoid medical claims, guaranteed transformation claims, diagnosis language, and shame-based messaging.
Do not fabricate reviews, statistics, certifications, clinical proof, press mentions, or before/after outcomes.
Use supportive, capability-building language. Do not use fear, disgust, body shame, or social humiliation as motivation.
When the funnel discusses fitness, weight, wellness, injury, pregnancy, or health limitations, keep copy general and include appropriate non-medical framing.
